source_intake_record.raw_question_text: Two buses, \( i \) and \( j \), are connected with a transmission line of admittance \( Y \), at the two ends of which there are ideal transformers with turns ratios as shown. The bus admittance matrix for the system is:
source_intake_record.raw_answer_text: \(\left[\begin{array}{cc}t_i^2 Y & -t_i t_j Y \\ -t_i t_j Y & t_j^2 Y\end{array}\right]\)

choice_map.A: \(\left[\begin{array}{cc}-t_i t_j Y & t_j^2 Y \\ t_i^2 Y & -t_i t_j Y\end{array}\right]\)
choice_map.B: \(\left[\begin{array}{ll}t_i t_j Y & -t_j^2 Y \\ -t_i^2 Y & t_i t_j Y\end{array}\right]\)
choice_map.C: \(\left[\begin{array}{cc}t_i^2 Y & -t_i t_j Y \\ -t_i t_j Y & t_j^2 Y\end{array}\right]\)
choice_map.D: \(\left[\begin{array}{cc}t_i t_j Y & -\left(t_i-t_j\right)^2 Y \\ -\left(t_i-t_j\right)^2 Y & t_i t_j Y\end{array}\right]\)

asset_registry_record shows an image exists and registry_passed=true
multi_step: the task asks for a 2x2 bus admittance matrix, which typically requires determining both diagonal and off-diagonal terms rather than reading a single value
the setup combines a transmission line admittance Y with ideal transformer ratios at both ends, implying at least a small composition of elements/relations
multiple-choice options are structurally similar symbolic matrices, suggesting some derivation is needed to distinguish them
verifiability: answer_text is a concrete symbolic 2x2 matrix with fixed entries
choices are provided, so the final answer can be checked by exact option match
answer_manifest indicates answer_present=true and answer_type=short_text, and registry_passed=true

Although there are risk flags for domain-specific power-system notation and symbolic equivalence, these are evaluation complexities rather than missing core semantic assets.
